title: EVA-Client: A Unified Data Collection, Inference, and Deployment Framework for Embodied Policies on Real Robots
innovation_summary: EVA-Client: A Unified Data Collection, Inference, and Deployment Framework for Embodied Policies on Real Robots: We present EVA-Client, an open-source framework for deployment, data collection, and evaluation of trained manipulation policies on real robots.
